centralauth-admin-setstatus-success: Waxaad beddeshay xaaladda akoonka caalamiga ah "$1".
centralauth-automatic-global-groups-reas: Kooxaha caalamiga ah si otomaatig ah ayaa loo cusboonaysiiyay sababtoo ah isbeddelka kooxda maxalliga ah.
centralauth-foreign-contributions: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|wax ku biirin|wax ku biirin}} oo ku saabsan $2
centralauth-merge-method-new-desc: Waxa ay muujinaysaa  in la sameeyey akoon caalami ah si iskeed ah markii la sameeyey akoonkaan maxalliga ah.
centralauth-rename-confirm: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad guud ahaan u beddesho magaca isticmaalahan?
globalrenamequeue-vanish-email-subject-a: Codsiga baaba'a ee koontada waa la oggolaaday
globalrenamequeue-vanish-email-subject-r: Codsiga baaba'a ee koontada waa la diiday
globalvanishrequest-pretext:
Baaba'du waa '''miciinka ugu dambeeya''' waana in '''la isticmaalaa oo kaliya marka aad rabto inaad joojiso wax ka beddelka weligaa''' iyo sidoo kale si aad u qariso inta ugu badan ee xiriirradiisii hore. Tirtiridda koontada waxaa lagu sameeyaa iyadoo la beddelayo magaca koontadaada si dadka kale aysan u aqoonsan wax ku darsashadaada nidaamka loo yaqaanno baaba'da koontada. '''Baaba'du ma dammaanad qaadayso qarsoodi buuxda ama ma tirtirto wax ku darsashadii mashaariicda'''.

Si aad u sii waddo bilaabista nidaamka baaba'aya, fadlan buuxi foomka codsiga ee Baaba'da Koontada ee hoos ku qoran.
globalvanishrequest-blocked-title: Codsiga baaba’a ee koontada guud waa la diiday sababtoo ah koontadaada waa la xannibay
globalvanishrequest-autoapprove-public-n: Codsigan baaba'a ee isticmaalaha si otomaatig ah ayaa loo oggolaaday.
